comments.body:
> I assume you are certain enough that no existing user will be broken by this?

I assume so - and really, we're fixing something as copy should not send certs to both src and dest (I can keep compat with inspect and layers though)

@mtrmac right now the main skopeo user is `atomic` - and it's not using `--cert-path` at all from what I can see - sure `--tls-verify` must be kept for backward compatibility there (assuming you're ok that a global `--tls-verify=true` as is right now, will switch off tls verification for src *AND* dest, as is right now :))
@mtrmac apart from https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/264#discussion_r90896815 (which I'm not totally sure of) I fixed your comments, PTAL again

> apart from https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/264#discussion_r90896815 (which I'm not totally sure of)

Yeah, splicing strings is ugly...

LGTM, make sure to drop the non-`master` c/i branch in `vendor.sh`
